channel.title: Posts on A minimal Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on A minimal Hugo website

item.title: WordPronuciation
item.description: he的弱读 there he is = [there rui iz] who is he [hu aizi] did he = [di di] but if he = [bu di fi] but he = [bu di] what he = [wha di] food is he = [foo di zi] does he = [de zi] believe he = [believ di] is he = [i zi] what's he = [whʌ tsi] what'd he = [whʌ di] guess he = [ge si] because he = [bi cuzi] who's he = [hu zi] him的弱读 told him = [tol dɜm] aboudt hime = [abou dɜm] leave him alone = [li vɜ ma long] got him = [gʌ dɜm] give him up = [gi vɜ map] let him in = [lɜ dɜ min] want him = [wan nɜm] met him = [me dɜm] killed him = [kill dɜm] put him = [pu dɜm]
